name: Practice Exam page handles no-upload state correctly
description: Verify the Practice Exam page does not crash when no exam content has been uploaded. The page should show upload controls and guidance.

planSteps.description: Log in with the test credentials and navigate to /app/exam.
The Practice Exam page renders without crashing. A heading containing 'Exam' or 'Practice' is visible.
Upload controls or a text input area for pasting content is visible, OR a clear empty-state message explaining what to do.
No JavaScript errors or blank screen. The sidebar navigation remains accessible.
